posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Hello, World!Welcome to my blog! I’m r3ber, (aka reber), a Informatics Engineering student with a strong passion in cybersecurity. I decided to create this blog to document my journey, the things I learn, the challenges I face and the projects I build. What to ExpectThis blog will mainly focus on: Resources & Tutorials - notes on topics like Reverse Engineering, forensics and more; CTF Writeups - Walkthoughs of challenges I solve; Projects - code, tools or experiments; Random Stuff - occasional reflections on tech. 1234567891011121314 .--,-``-.,-.----. / / '. ,---,. ,---,.,-.----.\ / \ / ../ ; ,' .' \ ,' .' |\ / \; : \ \ ``\ .`- ',---.' .' |,---.' |; : \| | .\ : \___\/ \ :| | |: || | .'| | .\ :. : |: | \ : |: : : /: : |-,. : |: || | \ : / / / : | ; : | ;/|| | \ :| : . / \ \ \ | : \| : .'| : . /; | | \ ___ / : || | . || | |-,; | | \| | ;\ \ / /\ / :' : '; |' : ;/|| | ;\ \: ' | \.'/ ,,/ ',- .| | | ; | | \: ' | \.': : :-' \ ''\ ; | : / | : .': : :-'| |.' \ \ .' | | ,' | | ,' | |.'`---' `--`-,,-' `----' `----' `---'
